problem: Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different?
hypothesis: The key to Why does biological neural computation use 20W while AI uses megawatts — what is different? is Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent plasticity — specifically Neuromorphic spike-timing dependent — which would help 8,000,000,000 people affected.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
